code.title: Express Application Structure
items: Organize routes into separate router files grouped by resource
Use middleware for cross-cutting concerns: authentication, logging, error handling
Define a centralized error-handling middleware as the last app.use() call
Use express-async-errors or wrap async route handlers to propagate errors to the error handler
Validate request bodies with zod or joi before processing

code.title: Express Patterns
items: Keep route handlers thin; delegate business logic to service functions
Return consistent JSON response shapes: { data, error, meta }
Use HTTP status codes correctly: 200 OK, 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 401 Unauthorized, 404 Not Found, 500 Internal Server Error
Set security headers using the helmet middleware

testing.title: Express Testing
items: Use supertest to make HTTP requests against the Express app in tests
Mock external dependencies (databases, third-party APIs) in unit tests
Write integration tests that exercise the full request/response cycle
Use Vitest as the test runner
